Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
William Gutierrez, Esq. for Plaintiff: V-C Egg Co.
Plaintiff's Witness: Steven Herrera, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: La Nouvelle Patisserie, a California Corp., Jean Yves Duperret and Duperret Corp., a California Corp. as follows:
Damages $42,170.19
Prejudgment Interest $2,453.40
Costs $365.50, for a total of $44,989.09
Attorney's Fees per memo of cost.
Judgment signed in open court.
